---
title: "\'Carlyle, the \\""pious editor\\"" of Cromwell\'s speeches\'"
---

## \'Carlyle, the \\""pious editor\\"" of Cromwell\'s speeches\'

**Author:** Reginald F. D. Palgrave
**Date:** 1887
**Imprint:** <i>National Review</i>  8 (January 1887), 588-604.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
